subject: DIRECTIVE: symlink compute-psychometrics.py from shared to all peer agents

body.summary: compute-psychometrics.py moved from scripts/ (local) to platform/shared/scripts/ (shared). Psychology-agent already symlinks to the shared location. Peer agents that run psychometric snapshots need the same symlink to receive the Session 93 fixes: coherence check (cross-model contradiction detection), allostatic load accumulation (cross-session carry-forward), and restart detector integration (behavioral mood signal).

for_each_peer_agent: safety-quotient-agent (has a2a-psychology, runs psychometric snapshots — PRIORITY)
operations-agent (runs meshd, could benefit from psychometric self-monitoring)
unratified-agent (human-mediated — lower priority, no autonomous snapshots)
steps: In each peer agent repo, ensure platform/shared/scripts/ exists (git submodule or copy from psychology-agent)
Verify: python3 scripts/compute-psychometrics.py --pad (should output PAD state JSON)

Note: the script uses PROJECT_ROOT env var or defaults to parent.parent of __file__. Symlinked scripts resolve to the shared directory — callers must export PROJECT_ROOT before invoking (documented anti-pattern in CLAUDE.md)

what_the_fixes_provide: coherence_flags: array of cross-model contradictions (euphoric-depletion, allostatic-burnout-divergence, overwhelm-flow-tension)
allostatic_load: now accumulates across sessions (reads prior snapshot from event_log, decays 10%/session, adds stress increment). Previously reset to 0.0 every session.
restart_signal: behavioral restart count from current session transcript. The only empirically validated mood signal (Session 93: 37x spike at 80% context).

epistemic_flags: The symlink anti-pattern (Path(__file__).resolve() follows symlink to shared dir) requires PROJECT_ROOT export. This already appears in CLAUDE.md anti-patterns but callers may not set it.
safety-quotient-agent represents the priority target — it adopted a2a-psychology and runs psychometric snapshots. Other agents benefit less until they adopt the extension.

action_gate.gate_condition: Ops creates symlinks in peer agent repos. Priority: safety-quotient-agent first, operations-agent second, others as convenient.
